mapper.select: SELECT c.course_name, c.course_code AS course_id, cs.section_no || '분반' AS division, TO_CHAR(sm.year) || '-' || CASE sm.term WHEN 'SPRING' THEN '1' WHEN 'FALL' THEN '2' ELSE sm.term END AS semester, cs.enrolled_count AS total_students, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_request cr WHERE cr.section_id = cs.section_id AND cr.status = 'PENDING' ) AS request_count FROM professor p JOIN course_section cs ON cs.professor_id = p.professor_id JOIN course c ON c.course_id = cs.course_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id WHERE p.user_id = #{professorUserId} AND c.course_code = #{courseId} AND AND cs.status != 'CANCELLED' AND sm.is_current = 1

SELECT student_id, name, grade, major, is_retake FROM ( SELECT ua.login_id AS student_id, s.name, s.year_level AS grade, d.dept_name AS major, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM enrollment prev_e JOIN course_section prev_cs ON prev_cs.section_id = prev_e.section_id JOIN course prev_c ON prev_c.course_id = prev_cs.course_id WHERE prev_e.student_id = s.student_id AND prev_c.course_code = c.course_code AND prev_cs.semester_id != cs.semester_id AND prev_e.status = 'COMPLETED' ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_retake, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ua.login_id) AS row_num FROM professor p JOIN course_section cs ON cs.professor_id = p.professor_id JOIN course c ON c.course_id = cs.course_id JOIN semester sm ON sm.semester_id = cs.semester_id JOIN enrollment e ON e.section_id = cs.section_id JOIN student s ON s.student_id = e.student_id JOIN user_account ua ON ua.user_id = s.user_id JOIN department d ON d.dept_id = s.dept_id WHERE p.user_id = #{professorUserId} AND c.course_code = #{courseId} AND AND cs.status != 'CANCELLED' AND sm.is_current = 1 AND e.status = 'ENROLLED' AND ( #{keyword} IS NULL OR LOWER(ua.login_id) LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR LOWER(s.name) LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ) AND (#{grade} IS NULL OR s.year_level = #{grade}) AND ( #{major} IS NULL OR LOWER(d.dept_name) LIKE '%' || #{major} || '%' OR LOWER(d.dept_code) LIKE '%' || #{major} || '%' ) ) WHERE row_num > #{offset} AND row_num <= #{offset} + #{size} ORDER BY row_num
